RegistryBroadcaster is called when fleet state changes that the dashboard should see.\n28\ttype RegistryBroadcaster interface {\n29\t\tBroadcastRegistryState(nodes []NodeRecord, room RoomConfig)\n30\t}\n31\t\n32\t// ModeChangeBroadcaster is called when system mode changes.\n33\ttype ModeChangeBroadcaster interface {\n34\t\tBroadcastSystemModeChange(event events.SystemModeChangeEvent)\n35\t}\n36\t\n37\t// BLEPresenceProvider provides BLE device presence information for auto-away detection.\n38\ttype BLEPresenceProvider interface {\n39\t\t// GetAllRegisteredDevices returns all registered BLE devices (MAC -> person_id)\n40\t\tGetAllRegisteredDevices() (map[string]string, error)\n41\t\t// GetRecentRSSIObservations returns recent RSSI observations for a device\n42\t\tGetRecentRSSIObservations(mac string, maxAge time.Duration) []BLEObservation\n43\t}\n44\t\n45\t// PersonNameProvider provides person name lookups for mode change events.\n46\ttype PersonNameProvider interface {\n47\t\tGetPersonName(personID string) string\n48\t}\n49\t\n50\t// BLEObservation represents a BLE RSSI observation with device info.\n51\ttype BLEObservation struct {\n52\t\tDeviceMAC string    // The BLE device MAC address\n53\t\tNodeMAC   string    // The node that observed this device\n54\t\tRSSIdBm   int\n55\t\tTimestamp time.Time\n56\t}\n57\t\n58\t// AutoAwayConfig holds configuration for auto-away detection.\n59\ttype AutoAwayConfig struct {\n60\t\tEnabled              bool          `json:\"enabled\"`\n61\t\tAbsenceDuration      time.Duration `json:\"absence_duration\"`       // Default: 15 minutes\n62\t\tAutoDisarmRSSI       int           `json:\"auto_disarm_rssi\"`       // Default: -70 dBm\n63\t\tManualOverridePause  time.Duration `json:\"manual_override_pause\"` // Default: 30 minutes\n64\t}\n65\t\n66\t// DefaultAutoAwayConfig returns default auto-away configuration.\n67\tfunc DefaultAutoAwayConfig() AutoAwayConfig {\n68\t\treturn AutoAwayConfig{\n69\t\t\tEnabled:             true,\n70\t\t\tAbsenceDuration:     15 * time.Minute,\n71\t\t\tAutoDisarmRSSI:      -70,\n72\t\t\tManualOverridePause: 30 * time.Minute,\n73\t\t}\n74\t}\n75\t\n76\t// Manager handles fleet-level operations: role assignment, stagger scheduling, and self-healing.\n77\ttype Manager struct {\n78\t\tmu       sync.RWMutex\n79\t\tregistry *Registry\n80\t\tnotifier NodeStateNotifier\n81\t\tbcaster  RegistryBroadcaster\n82\t\n83\t\t// online tracks which MACs are currently connected.\n84\t\tonline map[string]struct{}\n85\t\n86\t\t// roleIndex tracks which nodes have been assigned TX.\n87\t\ttxNodes []string\n88\t\n89\t\t// stagger scheduling: how many TX nodes have been assigned.\n90\t\ttxCount int\n91\t\n92\t\t// healTick is how often we check for stale/missing assignments.\n93\t\thealTick time.Duration\n94\t\n95\t\t// System mode management\n96\t\tsystemMode            events.SystemMode\n97\t\tmodeChangeBroadcaster ModeChangeBroadcaster\n98\t\tautoAwayConfig        AutoAwayConfig\n99\t\tblePresenceProvider   BLEPresenceProvider\n100\t\tpersonProvider        PersonNameProvider\n101\t\tmanualOverrideUntil   time.Time\n102\t\tlastDeviceSeen        map[string]time.Time // MAC -> last seen time\n103\t\tmodeCheckInterval     time.Duration\n104\t\n105\t\t// Callback for mode changes\n106\t\tonModeChange func(events.SystemModeChangeEvent)\n107\t\n108\t\t// Collision detection and adaptive re-stagger\n109\t\tcollisionDetector   *CollisionDetector\n110\t\tcollisionCheckTick  time.Duration\n111\t}\n112\t\n113\t// NewManager creates a fleet manager backed by registry.\n114\tfunc NewManager(reg *Registry) *Manager {\n115\t\tm := &Manager{\n116\t\t\tregistry:           reg,\n117\t\t\tonline:             make(map[string]struct{}),\n118\t\t\thealTick:           60 * time.Second,\n119\t\t\tsystemMode:         events.ModeHome,\n120\t\t\tautoAwayConfig:     DefaultAutoAwayConfig(),\n121\t\t\tlastDeviceSeen:     make(map[string]time.Time),\n122\t\t\tmodeCheckInterval:  30 * time.Second,\n123\t\t\tcollisionDetector:  NewCollisionDetector(),\n124\t\t\tcollisionCheckTick: 10 * time.Second,\n125\t\t}\n126\t\t// Set up re-stagger callback\n127\t\tm.collisionDetector.SetRestaggerCallback(func() {\n128\t\t\tm.AdaptiveRestagger()\n129\t\t})\n130\t\treturn m\n131\t}\n132\t\n133\t// SetNotifier sets the ingestion server callback.\n134\tfunc (m *Manager) SetNotifier(n NodeStateNotifier) {\n135\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n136\t\tm.notifier = n\n137\t\tm.mu.Unlock()\n138\t}\n139\t\n140\t// SetBroadcaster sets the dashboard broadcaster.\n141\tfunc (m *Manager) SetBroadcaster(b RegistryBroadcaster) {\n142\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n143\t\tm.bcaster = b\n144\t\tm.mu.Unlock()\n145\t}\n146\t\n147\t// OnNodeConnected is called when a node completes its hello handshake.\n148\t// It persists the node, assigns a role, and broadcasts updated state.\n149\tfunc (m *Manager) OnNodeConnected(mac, firmware, chip string) {\n150\t\tif err := m.registry.UpsertNode(mac, firmware, chip); err != nil {\n151\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: upsert node %s: %v\", mac, err)\n152\t\t}\n153\t\n154\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n155\t\tm.online[mac] = struct{}{}\n156\t\tm.mu.Unlock()\n157\t\n158\t\trole := m.assignRole(mac)\n159\t\tif err := m.registry.SetNodeRole(mac, role); err != nil {\n160\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: set role %s: %v\", mac, err)\n161\t\t}\n162\t\n163\t\tm.applyRoleAndConfig(mac, role)\n164\t\tm.broadcastRegistry()\n165\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: node %s joined as %s\", mac, role)\n166\t}\n167\t\n168\t// OnNodeDisconnected is called when a node disconnects.\n169\tfunc (m *Manager) OnNodeDisconnected(mac string) {\n170\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n171\t\tdelete(m.online, mac)\n172\t\tm.mu.Unlock()\n173\t\n174\t\t// If the lost node was a TX node, reassign TX roles.\n175\t\tm.rebalanceRoles()\n176\t\tm.broadcastRegistry()\n177\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: node %s left, rebalanced roles\", mac)\n178\t}\n179\t\n180\t// Run starts the periodic self-healing loop.\n181\tfunc (m *Manager) Run(ctx context.Context) {\n182\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(m.healTick)\n183\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n184\t\n185\t\tcollisionTicker := time.NewTicker(m.collisionCheckTick)\n186\t\tdefer collisionTicker.Stop()\n187\t\n188\t\tfor {\n189\t\t\tselect {\n190\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n191\t\t\t\treturn\n192\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n193\t\t\t\tm.selfHeal()\n194\t\t\tcase <-collisionTicker.C:\n195\t\t\t\tm.checkCollisions()\n196\t\t\t}\n197\t\t}\n198\t}\n199\t\n200\t// GetRegistry returns the underlying registry for REST API use.\n201\tfunc (m *Manager) GetRegistry() *Registry {\n202\t\treturn m.registry\n203\t}\n204\t\n205\t// BroadcastRegistry triggers a one-off registry state broadcast.\n206\tfunc (m *Manager) BroadcastRegistry() {\n207\t\tm.broadcastRegistry()\n208\t}\n209\t\n210\t// OverrideRole manually sets a node's role, pushing the update to the node if online,\n211\t// and broadcasting the updated registry state.\n212\tfunc (m *Manager) OverrideRole(mac, role string) error {\n213\t\tif err := m.registry.SetNodeRole(mac, role); err != nil {\n214\t\t\treturn err\n215\t\t}\n216\t\tm.mu.RLock()\n217\t\tnotifier := m.notifier\n218\t\tm.mu.RUnlock()\n219\t\tif notifier != nil {\n220\t\t\tnotifier.SendRoleToMAC(mac, role, \"\")\n221\t\t}\n222\t\tm.broadcastRegistry()\n223\t\treturn nil\n224\t}\n225\t\n226\t// IdentifyNode sends an LED blink command to a node for identification.\n227\t// Returns true if the command was sent successfully, false if the node is not connected.\n228\tfunc (m *Manager) IdentifyNode(mac string, durationMS int) bool {\n229\t\tm.mu.RLock()\n230\t\tnotifier := m.notifier\n231\t\tm.mu.RUnlock()\n232\t\tif notifier == nil {\n233\t\t\treturn false\n234\t\t}\n235\t\treturn notifier.SendIdentifyToMAC(mac, durationMS)\n236\t}\n237\t\n238\t// ─── Role Assignment ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n239\t\n240\t// assignRole determines the role for the given MAC based on total connected count.\n241\t//\n242\t// Strategy:\n243\t//   - 1 node: tx_rx (both TX and RX, single-node mode)\n244\t//   - 2 nodes: one TX, one RX (alternating by join order)\n245\t//   - 3+ nodes: floor(N/2) nodes assigned TX, rest RX, staggered TX slots\n246\tfunc (m *Manager) assignRole(mac string) string {\n247\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n248\t\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n249\t\n250\t\tn := len(m.online)\n251\t\tswitch {\n252\t\tcase n <= 1:\n253\t\t\treturn \"tx_rx\"\n254\t\tcase n == 2:\n255\t\t\t// First to arrive is TX, second is RX.\n256\t\t\tif m.txCount == 0 {\n257\t\t\t\tm.txCount++\n258\t\t\t\tm.txNodes = append(m.txNodes, mac)\n259\t\t\t\treturn \"tx\"\n260\t\t\t}\n261\t\t\treturn \"rx\"\n262\t\tdefault:\n263\t\t\t// Keep TX count at floor(N/2), promote this node to TX if needed.\n264\t\t\ttargetTX := n / 2\n265\t\t\tif len(m.txNodes) < targetTX {\n266\t\t\t\tm.txCount++\n267\t\t\t\tm.txNodes = append(m.txNodes, mac)\n268\t\t\t\treturn \"tx\"\n269\t\t\t}\n270\t\t\treturn \"rx\"\n271\t\t}\n272\t}\n273\t\n274\t// rebalanceRoles re-evaluates TX/RX assignments when a node leaves.\n275\tfunc (m *Manager) rebalanceRoles() {\n276\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n277\t\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n278\t\n279\t\t// Rebuild tx node list from only online nodes.\n280\t\tonline := make([]string, 0, len(m.online))\n281\t\tfor mac := range m.online {\n282\t\t\tonline = append(online, mac)\n283\t\t}\n284\t\tsort.Strings(online)\n285\t\n286\t\tn := len(online)\n287\t\tif n == 0 {\n288\t\t\tm.txNodes = nil\n289\t\t\tm.txCount = 0\n290\t\t\treturn\n291\t\t}\n292\t\n293\t\ttargetTX := 1\n294\t\tif n >= 2 {\n295\t\t\ttargetTX = n / 2\n296\t\t}\n297\t\n298\t\tnewTX := make([]string, 0, targetTX)\n299\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(online) && len(newTX) < targetTX; i++ {\n300\t\t\tnewTX = append(newTX, online[i])\n301\t\t}\n302\t\tm.txNodes = newTX\n303\t\tm.txCount = len(newTX)\n304\t\n305\t\tnotifier := m.notifier\n306\t\tif notifier == nil {\n307\t\t\treturn\n308\t\t}\n309\t\n310\t\t// Send updated roles; stagger TX slot assignments.\n311\t\tnTX := len(newTX)\n312\t\tfor i, mac := range online {\n313\t\t\trole := \"rx\"\n314\t\t\ttxIndex := -1\n315\t\t\tfor j, txMAC := range newTX {\n316\t\t\t\tif mac == txMAC {\n317\t\t\t\t\trole = \"tx\"\n318\t\t\t\t\ttxIndex = j\n319\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n320\t\t\t\t}\n321\t\t\t}\n322\t\t\tif n == 1 {\n323\t\t\t\trole = \"tx_rx\"\n324\t\t\t}\n325\t\n326\t\t\t_ = m.registry.SetNodeRole(mac, role) //nolint:errcheck\n327\t\n328\t\t\t// Stagger TX slot: divide 1s into nTX slots.\n329\t\t\trateHz := 20\n330\t\t\ttxSlotUS := 0\n331\t\t\tif (role == \"tx\" || role == \"tx_rx\") && nTX > 1 {\n332\t\t\t\tslotUS := 1000000 / (rateHz * nTX)\n333\t\t\t\t// Use TX index for proper staggering\n334\t\t\t\tif txIndex >= 0 {\n335\t\t\t\t\ttxSlotUS = txIndex * slotUS\n336\t\t\t\t} else {\n337\t\t\t\t\t// For tx_rx role, use node index\n338\t\t\t\t\ttxSlotUS = i * slotUS\n339\t\t\t\t}\n340\t\t\t}\n341\t\n342\t\t\t// Update collision detector tracking\n343\t\t\tm.updateTXNodeCollisionTrackingLocked(mac, role)\n344\t\n345\t\t\tnotifier.SendRoleToMAC(mac, role, \"\")\n346\t\t\tnotifier.SendConfigToMAC(mac, rateHz, txSlotUS, 0.02)\n347\t\t}\n348\t}\n349\t\n350\t// applyRoleAndConfig sends role and rate config to a single node.\n351\tfunc (m *Manager) applyRoleAndConfig(mac, role string) {\n352\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n353\t\tnotifier := m.notifier\n354\t\ttxNodes := m.txNodes\n355\t\tm.mu.Unlock()\n356\t\n357\t\tif notifier == nil {\n358\t\t\treturn\n359\t\t}\n360\t\n361\t\tnotifier.SendRoleToMAC(mac, role, \"\")\n362\t\n363\t\trateHz := 20\n364\t\n365\t\t// Compute txSlotUS for TX nodes\n366\t\ttxSlotUS := 0\n367\t\tif role == \"tx\" || role == \"tx_rx\" {\n368\t\t\t// Find the index of this MAC in the TX nodes list\n369\t\t\ttxIndex := -1\n370\t\t\tfor i, txMAC := range txNodes {\n371\t\t\t\tif txMAC == mac {\n372\t\t\t\t\ttxIndex = i\n373\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n374\t\t\t\t}\n375\t\t\t}\n376\t\n377\t\t\t// Calculate stagger offset if we have multiple TX nodes\n378\t\t\tnumTX := len(txNodes)\n379\t\t\tif numTX > 1 && txIndex >= 0 {\n380\t\t\t\tslotUS := 1_000_000 / (rateHz * numTX)\n381\t\t\t\ttxSlotUS = txIndex * slotUS\n382\t\t\t}\n383\t\t}\n384\t\n385\t\t// Register/unregister with collision detector based on role\n386\t\tm.updateTXNodeCollisionTracking(mac, role)\n387\t\n388\t\tnotifier.SendConfigToMAC(mac, rateHz, txSlotUS, 0.02)\n389\t}\n390\t\n391\t// selfHeal checks for mismatched roles and re-pushes config if needed.\n392\tfunc (m *Manager) selfHeal() {\n393\t\tnodes, err := m.registry.GetAllNodes()\n394\t\tif err != nil {\n395\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: self-heal query: %v\", err)\n396\t\t\treturn\n397\t\t}\n398\t\n399\t\tm.mu.RLock()\n400\t\tnotifier := m.notifier\n401\t\tm.mu.RUnlock()\n402\t\n403\t\tif notifier == nil {\n404\t\t\treturn\n405\t\t}\n406\t\n407\t\tconnected := make(map[string]struct{})\n408\t\tfor _, mac := range notifier.GetConnectedMACs() {\n409\t\t\tconnected[mac] = struct{}{}\n410\t\t}\n411\t\n412\t\tfor _, n := range nodes {\n413\t\t\tif _, ok := connected[n.MAC]; !ok {\n414\t\t\t\tcontinue\n415\t\t\t}\n416\t\t\t// Re-push stored role for nodes that are online.\n417\t\t\tnotifier.SendRoleToMAC(n.MAC, n.Role, \"\")\n418\t\t}\n419\t}\n420\t\n421\t// broadcastRegistry sends current node and room state to dashboard clients.\n422\tfunc (m *Manager) broadcastRegistry() {\n423\t\tm.mu.RLock()\n424\t\tbcaster := m.bcaster\n425\t\tm.mu.RUnlock()\n426\t\n427\t\tif bcaster == nil {\n428\t\t\treturn\n429\t\t}\n430\t\n431\t\tnodes, err := m.registry.GetAllNodes()\n432\t\tif err != nil {\n433\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: get nodes for broadcast: %v\", err)\n434\t\t\treturn\n435\t\t}\n436\t\n437\t\troom, err := m.registry.GetRoom()\n438\t\tif err != nil {\n439\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: get room for broadcast: %v\", err)\n440\t\t\treturn\n441\t\t}\n442\t\n443\t\tbcaster.BroadcastRegistryState(nodes, *room)\n444\t}\n445\t\n446\t// ─── System Mode Management ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n447\t\n448\t// SetModeChangeBroadcaster sets the broadcaster for mode change events.\n449\tfunc (m *Manager) SetModeChangeBroadcaster(b ModeChangeBroadcaster) {\n450\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n451\t\tm.modeChangeBroadcaster = b\n452\t\tm.mu.Unlock()\n453\t}\n454\t\n455\t// SetBLEPresenceProvider sets the BLE presence provider for auto-away detection.\n456\tfunc (m *Manager) SetBLEPresenceProvider(p BLEPresenceProvider) {\n457\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n458\t\tm.blePresenceProvider = p\n459\t\tm.mu.Unlock()\n460\t}\n461\t\n462\t// ProcessBLEObservations processes BLE observations for auto-away/disarm detection.\n463\t// This should be called when BLE data is received from nodes.\n464\tfunc (m *Manager) ProcessBLEObservations(observations []BLEObservation) {\n465\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n466\t\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n467\t\n468\t\t// Skip if no BLE provider or auto-away is disabled\n469\t\tif m.blePresenceProvider == nil || !m.autoAwayConfig.Enabled {\n470\t\t\treturn\n471\t\t}\n472\t\n473\t\t// Check if manual override is active\n474\t\tif time.Now().Before(m.manualOverrideUntil) {\n475\t\t\treturn\n476\t\t}\n477\t\n478\t\tnow := time.Now()\n479\t\n480\t\t// Get all registered devices\n481\t\tregisteredDevices, err := m.blePresenceProvider.GetAllRegisteredDevices()\n482\t\tif err != nil {\n483\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: get registered devices: %v\", err)\n484\t\t\treturn\n485\t\t}\n486\t\n487\t\t// Check for auto-disarm: any registered device seen with RSSI > threshold\n488\t\tif m.systemMode == events.ModeAway {\n489\t\t\tfor _, obs := range observations {\n490\t\t\t\tif personID, isRegistered := registeredDevices[obs.DeviceMAC]; isRegistered {\n491\t\t\t\t\tif obs.RSSIdBm >= m.autoAwayConfig.AutoDisarmRSSI {\n492\t\t\t\t\t\t// Get person name if available\n493\t\t\t\t\t\tpersonName := \"\"\n494\t\t\t\t\t\tif m.personProvider != nil {\n495\t\t\t\t\t\t\tpersonName = m.personProvider.GetPersonName(personID)\n496\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n497\t\n498\t\t\t\t\t\t// Auto-disarm\n499\t\t\t\t\t\tprevMode := m.systemMode\n500\t\t\t\t\t\tm.systemMode = events.ModeHome\n501\t\n502\t\t\t\t\t\tevent := events.SystemModeChangeEvent{\n503\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPreviousMode: prevMode,\n504\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNewMode:      events.ModeHome,\n505\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       \"auto_disarm\",\n506\t\t\t\t\t\t\tTimestamp:    now,\n507\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPersonID:     personID,\n508\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPersonName:   personName,\n509\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n510\t\n511\t\t\t\t\t\tif m.modeChangeBroadcaster != nil {\n512\t\t\t\t\t\t\tm.modeChangeBroadcaster.BroadcastSystemModeChange(event)\n513\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n514\t\n515\t\t\t\t\t\tif m.onModeChange != nil {\n516\t\t\t\t\t\t\tgo m.onModeChange(event)\n517\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n518\t\n519\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: auto-disarm triggered - registered device %s seen (RSSI: %d)\", obs.DeviceMAC, obs.RSSIdBm)\n520\t\t\t\t\t\treturn\n521\t\t\t\t\t}\n522\t\t\t\t}\n523\t\t\t}\n524\t\t}\n525\t\n526\t\t// Update last seen times for registered devices\n527\t\tfor _, obs := range observations {\n528\t\t\tif _, isRegistered := registeredDevices[obs.DeviceMAC]; isRegistered {\n529\t\t\t\tm.lastDeviceSeen[obs.DeviceMAC] = now\n530\t\t\t}\n531\t\t}\n532\t}\n533\t\n534\t// CheckAutoAway checks if all registered devices have been absent for the configured duration.\n535\t// This should be called periodically.\n536\tfunc (m *Manager) CheckAutoAway() {\n537\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n538\t\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n539\t\n540\t\t// Skip if no BLE provider or auto-away is disabled\n541\t\tif m.blePresenceProvider == nil || !m.autoAwayConfig.Enabled {\n542\t\t\treturn\n543\t\t}\n544\t\n545\t\t// Check if manual override is active\n546\t\tif time.Now().Before(m.manualOverrideUntil) {\n547\t\t\treturn\n548\t\t}\n549\t\n550\t\t// Don't auto-away if already away\n551\t\tif m.systemMode == events.ModeAway {\n552\t\t\treturn\n553\t\t}\n554\t\n555\t\t// Get all registered devices\n556\t\tregisteredDevices, err := m.blePresenceProvider.GetAllRegisteredDevices()\n557\t\tif err != nil {\n558\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: get registered devices for auto-away: %v\", err)\n559\t\t\treturn\n560\t\t}\n561\t\n562\t\tif len(registeredDevices) == 0 {\n563\t\t\treturn // No registered devices, can't determine away status\n564\t\t}\n565\t\n566\t\t// Check if all devices have been absent for the configured duration\n567\t\tnow := time.Now()\n568\t\tallAbsent := true\n569\t\n570\t\tfor mac := range registeredDevices {\n571\t\t\tlastSeen, exists := m.lastDeviceSeen[mac]\n572\t\t\tif !exists || now.Sub(lastSeen) >= m.autoAwayConfig.AbsenceDuration {\n573\t\t\t\t// Device not seen recently\n574\t\t\t\tcontinue\n575\t\t\t}\n576\t\t\t// At least one device is present\n577\t\t\tallAbsent = false\n578\t\t\tbreak\n579\t\t}\n580\t\n581\t\tif allAbsent {\n582\t\t\t// Auto-away\n583\t\t\tprevMode := m.systemMode\n584\t\t\tm.systemMode = events.ModeAway\n585\t\n586\t\t\tevent := events.SystemModeChangeEvent{\n587\t\t\t\tPreviousMode: prevMode,\n588\t\t\t\tNewMode:      events.ModeAway,\n589\t\t\t\tReason:       \"auto_away\",\n590\t\t\t\tTimestamp:    now,\n591\t\t\t}\n592\t\n593\t\t\tif m.modeChangeBroadcaster != nil {\n594\t\t\t\tm.modeChangeBroadcaster.BroadcastSystemModeChange(event)\n595\t\t\t}\n596\t\n597\t\t\tif m.onModeChange != nil {\n598\t\t\t\tgo rate\")\n738\t\n739\t\tm.mu.Lock()\n740\t\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n741\t\n742\t\tif m.notifier == nil {\n743\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: Cannot re-stagger - no notifier \"tx\" || role == \"tx_rx\" {\n790\t\t\tcd.RegisterTXNode(mac)\n791\t\t}\n792\t}\n793\t\n794\t// updateTXNodeCollisionTrackingLocked updates the collision detector's TX node registration\n795\t// when {\n\tBroadcastSystemModeChange(event events.SystemModeChangeEvent)\n}\n\n// BLEPresenceProvider provides BLE device presence information for auto-away detection.\ntype BLEPresenceProvider interface {\n\t// GetAllRegisteredDevices returns all registered BLE devices (MAC -> person_id)\n\tGetAllRegisteredDevices() (map[string]string, error)\n\t// GetRecentRSSIObservations returns recent RSSI PersonNameProvider interface {\n\tGetPersonName(personID string) string\n}\n\n// BLEObservation represents a BLE RSSI observation with device info.\ntype BLEObservation struct {\n\tDeviceMAC string    // The BLE device MAC address\n\tNodeMAC   string    // The node that observed this device\n\tRSSIdBm   int\n\tTimestamp time.Time\n}\n\n// AutoAwayConfig holds configuration for auto-away detection.\ntype AutoAwayConfig struct {\n\tEnabled              bool          `json:\"enabled\"`\n\tAbsenceDuration      time.Duration `json:\"absence_duration\"`       // Default: 15 minutes\n\tAutoDisarmRSSI       int           `json:\"auto_disarm_rssi\"`       // Default: -70 dBm\n\tManualOverridePause  time.Duration `json:\"manual_override_pause\"` // Default: 30 minutes\n}\n\n// DefaultAutoAwayConfig returns default auto-away configuration.\nfunc DefaultAutoAwayConfig() AutoAwayConfig {\n\treturn AutoAwayConfig{\n\t\tEnabled:             true,\n\t\tAbsenceDuration:     15 * time.Minute,\n\t\tAutoDisarmRSSI:      -70,\n\t\tManualOverridePause: 30 * time.Minute,\n\t}\n}\n\n// Manager handles fleet-level operations: role assignment, stagger scheduling, and self-healing.\ntype Manager struct {\n\tmu       sync.RWMutex\n\tregistry *Registry\n\tnotifier NodeStateNotifier\n\tbcaster  RegistryBroadcaster\n\n\t// online tracks which MACs are currently connected.\n\tonline map[string]struct{}\n\n\t// roleIndex tracks which nodes have been assigned TX.\n\ttxNodes []string\n\n\t// stagger scheduling: how many TX nodes have been assigned.\n\ttxCount int\n\n\t// healTick is how often we check for stale/missing assignments.\n\thealTick time.Duration\n\n\t// System mode management\n\tsystemMode            events.SystemMode\n\tmodeChangeBroadcaster ModeChangeBroadcaster\n\tautoAwayConfig        AutoAwayConfig\n\tblePresenceProvider   BLEPresenceProvider\n\tpersonProvider        PersonNameProvider\n\tmanualOverrideUntil   time.Time\n\tlastDeviceSeen        map[string]time.Time // MAC -> last seen time\n\tmodeCheckInterval     time.Duration\n\n\t// Callback for mode changes\n\tonModeChange func(events.SystemModeChangeEvent)\n\n\t// Collision detection and adaptive re-stagger\n\tcollisionDetector   *CollisionDetector\n\tcollisionCheckTick  time.Duration\n}\n\n// NewManager creates a fleet manager backed by registry.\nfunc NewManager(reg *Registry) *Manager {\n\tm := &Manager{\n\t\tregistry:           reg,\n\t\tonline:             make(map[string]struct{}),\n\t\thealTick:           60 * time.Second,\n\t\tsystemMode:         events.ModeHome,\n\t\tautoAwayConfig:     DefaultAutoAwayConfig(),\n\t\tlastDeviceSeen:     make(map[string]time.Time),\n\t\tmodeCheckInterval:  30 * time.Second,\n\t\tcollisionDetector:  NewCollisionDetector(),\n\t\tcollisionCheckTick: 10 * time.Second,\n\t}\n\t// Set up re-stagger callback\n\tm.collisionDetector.SetRestaggerCallback(func() {\n\t\tm.AdaptiveRestagger()\n\t})\n\treturn m\n}\n\n// SetNotifier sets the ingestion server callback.\nfunc (m *Manager) SetNotifier(n NodeStateNotifier) {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tm.notifier = n\n\tm.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetBroadcaster sets the dashboard broadcaster.\nfunc (m *Manager) SetBroadcaster(b RegistryBroadcaster) {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tm.bcaster = b\n\tm.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// OnNodeConnected is called when a node completes its hello handshake.\n// It persists the node, assigns a role, and broadcasts updated state.\nfunc (m *Manager) OnNodeConnected(mac, firmware, chip string) {\n\tif err := m.registry.UpsertNode(mac, firmware, chip); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: upsert node %s: %v\", mac, err)\n\t}\n\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tm.online[mac] = struct{}{}\n\tm.mu.Unlock()\n\n\trole := m.assignRole(mac)\n\tif err := m.registry.SetNodeRole(mac, role); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: set role %s: %v\", mac, err)\n\t}\n\n\tm.applyRoleAndConfig(mac, role)\n\tm.broadcastRegistry()\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: node %s joined as %s\", mac, role)\n}\n\n// OnNodeDisconnected is called when a node disconnects.\nfunc (m *Manager) OnNodeDisconnected(mac string) {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tdelete(m.online, mac)\n\tm.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t// If the lost node was a TX node, reassign TX roles.\n\tm.rebalanceRoles()\n\tm.broadcastRegistry()\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: node %s left, rebalanced roles\", mac)\n}\n\n// Run starts the periodic self-healing loop.\nfunc (m *Manager) Run(ctx context.Context) {\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(m.healTick)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tcollisionTicker := time.NewTicker(m.collisionCheckTick)\n\tdefer collisionTicker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\tm.selfHeal()\n\t\tcase <-collisionTicker.C:\n\t\t\tm.checkCollisions()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetRegistry returns the underlying registry for REST API use.\nfunc (m *Manager) GetRegistry() *Registry {\n\treturn m.registry\n}\n\n// BroadcastRegistry triggers a one-off registry state broadcast.\nfunc (m *Manager) BroadcastRegistry() {\n\tm.broadcastRegistry()\n}\n\n// OverrideRole manually sets a node's role, pushing the update to the node if online,\n// and broadcasting the updated registry state.\nfunc (m *Manager) OverrideRole(mac, role string) error {\n\tif err := m.registry.SetNodeRole(mac, role); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tnotifier := m.notifier\n\tm.mu.RUnlock()\n\tif notifier != nil {\n\t\tnotifier.SendRoleToMAC(mac, role, \"\")\n\t}\n\tm.broadcastRegistry()\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// IdentifyNode sends an LED blink command to a node for identification.\n// Returns true if the command was sent successfully, false if the node is not connected.\nfunc (m *Manager) IdentifyNode(mac string, durationMS int) bool {\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tnotifier := m.notifier\n\tm.mu.RUnlock()\n\tif notifier == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\treturn notifier.SendIdentifyToMAC(mac, durationMS)\n}\n\n// ─── Role Assignment ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n// assignRole determines the role for the given MAC based on total connected count.\n//\n// Strategy:\n//   - 1 node: tx_rx (both TX and RX, single-node mode)\n//   - 2 nodes: one TX, one RX (alternating by join order)\n//   - 3+ nodes: floor(N/2) nodes assigned TX, rest RX, staggered TX slots\nfunc (m *Manager) assignRole(mac string) string {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tn := len(m.online)\n\tswitch {\n\tcase n <= 1:\n\t\treturn \"tx_rx\"\n\tcase n == 2:\n\t\t// First to arrive is TX, second is RX.\n\t\tif m.txCount == 0 {\n\t\t\tm.txCount++\n\t\t\tm.txNodes = append(m.txNodes, mac)\n\t\t\treturn \"tx\"\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn \"rx\"\n\tdefault:\n\t\t// Keep TX count at floor(N/2), promote this node to TX if needed.\n\t\ttargetTX := n / 2\n\t\tif len(m.txNodes) < targetTX {\n\t\t\tm.txCount++\n\t\t\tm.txNodes = append(m.txNodes, mac)\n\t\t\treturn \"tx\"\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn \"rx\"\n\t}\n}\n\n// rebalanceRoles re-evaluates TX/RX assignments when a node leaves.\nfunc (m *Manager) rebalanceRoles() {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Rebuild tx node list from only online nodes.\n\tonline := make([]string, 0, len(m.online))\n\tfor mac := range m.online {\n\t\tonline = append(online, mac)\n\t}\n\tsort.Strings(online)\n\n\tn := len(online)\n\tif n == 0 {\n\t\tm.txNodes = nil\n\t\tm.txCount = 0\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttargetTX := 1\n\tif n >= 2 {\n\t\ttargetTX = n / 2\n\t}\n\n\tnewTX := make([]string, 0, targetTX)\n\tfor i := 0; i < len(online) && len(newTX) < targetTX; i++ {\n\t\tnewTX = append(newTX, online[i])\n\t}\n\tm.txNodes = newTX\n\tm.txCount = len(newTX)\n\n\tnotifier := m.notifier\n\tif notifier == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Send updated roles; stagger TX slot assignments.\n\tnTX := len(newTX)\n\tfor i, mac := range online {\n\t\trole := \"rx\"\n\t\ttxIndex := -1\n\t\tfor j, txMAC := range newTX {\n\t\t\tif mac == txMAC {\n\t\t\t\trole = \"tx\"\n\t\t\t\ttxIndex = j\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif n == 1 {\n\t\t\trole = \"tx_rx\"\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_ = m.registry.SetNodeRole(mac, role) //nolint:errcheck\n\n\t\t// Stagger TX slot: divide 1s into nTX slots.\n\t\trateHz := 20\n\t\ttxSlotUS := 0\n\t\tif (role == \"tx\" || role == \"tx_rx\") && nTX > 1 {\n\t\t\tslotUS := 1000000 / (rateHz * nTX)\n\t\t\t// Use TX index for proper staggering\n\t\t\tif txIndex >= 0 {\n\t\t\t\ttxSlotUS = txIndex * slotUS\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t// For tx_rx role, use node index\n\t\t\t\ttxSlotUS = i * slotUS\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Update collision detector tracking\n\t\tm.updateTXNodeCollisionTrackingLocked(mac, role)\n\n\t\tnotifier.SendRoleToMAC(mac, role, \"\")\n\t\tnotifier.SendConfigToMAC(mac, rateHz, txSlotUS, 0.02)\n\t}\n}\n\n// applyRoleAndConfig sends role and rate config to a single node.\nfunc (m *Manager) applyRoleAndConfig(mac, role string) {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tnotifier := m.notifier\n\ttxNodes := m.txNodes\n\tm.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif notifier == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tnotifier.SendRoleToMAC(mac, role, \"\")\n\n\trateHz := 20\n\n\t// Compute txSlotUS for TX nodes\n\ttxSlotUS := 0\n\tif role == \"tx\" || role == \"tx_rx\" {\n\t\t// Find the index of this MAC in the TX nodes list\n\t\ttxIndex := -1\n\t\tfor i, txMAC := range txNodes {\n\t\t\tif txMAC == mac {\n\t\t\t\ttxIndex = i\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Calculate stagger offset if we have multiple TX nodes\n\t\tnumTX := len(txNodes)\n\t\tif numTX > 1 && txIndex >= 0 {\n\t\t\tslotUS := 1_000_000 / (rateHz * numTX)\n\t\t\ttxSlotUS = txIndex * slotUS\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Register/unregister with collision detector based on role\n\tm.updateTXNodeCollisionTracking(mac, role)\n\n\tnotifier.SendConfigToMAC(mac, rateHz, txSlotUS, 0.02)\n}\n\n// selfHeal checks for mismatched roles and re-pushes config if needed.\nfunc (m *Manager) selfHeal() {\n\tnodes, err := m.registry.GetAllNodes()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: self-heal query: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tnotifier := m.notifier\n\tm.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif notifier == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tconnected := make(map[string]struct{})\n\tfor _, mac := range notifier.GetConnectedMACs() {\n\t\tconnected[mac] = struct{}{}\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, n := range nodes {\n\t\tif _, ok := connected[n.MAC]; !ok {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Re-push stored role for nodes that are online.\n\t\tnotifier.SendRoleToMAC(n.MAC, n.Role, \"\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// broadcastRegistry sends current node and room state to dashboard clients.\nfunc (m *Manager) broadcastRegistry() {\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tbcaster := m.bcaster\n\tm.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif bcaster == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tnodes, err := m.registry.GetAllNodes()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: get nodes for broadcast: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\troom, err := m.registry.GetRoom()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: get room for broadcast: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tbcaster.BroadcastRegistryState(nodes, *room)\n}\n\n// ─── System Mode Management ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n// SetModeChangeBroadcaster sets the broadcaster for mode change events.\nfunc (m *Manager) SetModeChangeBroadcaster(b ModeChangeBroadcaster) {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tm.modeChangeBroadcaster = b\n\tm.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetBLEPresenceProvider sets the BLE presence provider for auto-away detection.\nfunc (m *Manager) SetBLEPresenceProvider(p BLEPresenceProvider) {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tm.blePresenceProvider = p\n\tm.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// ProcessBLEObservations processes BLE observations for auto-away/disarm detection.\n// This should be called when BLE data is received from nodes.\nfunc (m *Manager) ProcessBLEObservations(observations []BLEObservation) {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Skip if no BLE provider or auto-away is disabled\n\tif m.blePresenceProvider == nil || !m.autoAwayConfig.Enabled {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Check if manual override is active\n\tif time.Now().Before(m.manualOverrideUntil) {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\n\t// Get all registered devices\n\tregisteredDevices, err := m.blePresenceProvider.GetAllRegisteredDevices()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: get registered devices: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Check for auto-disarm: any registered device seen with RSSI > threshold\n\tif m.systemMode == events.ModeAway {\n\t\tfor _, obs := range observations {\n\t\t\tif personID, isRegistered := registeredDevices[obs.DeviceMAC]; isRegistered {\n\t\t\t\tif obs.RSSIdBm >= m.autoAwayConfig.AutoDisarmRSSI {\n\t\t\t\t\t// Get person name if available\n\t\t\t\t\tpersonName := \"\"\n\t\t\t\t\tif m.personProvider != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tpersonName = m.personProvider.GetPersonName(personID)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t// Auto-disarm\n\t\t\t\t\tprevMode := m.systemMode\n\t\t\t\t\tm.systemMode = events.ModeHome\n\n\t\t\t\t\tevent := events.SystemModeChangeEvent{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPreviousMode: prevMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNewMode:      events.ModeHome,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       \"auto_disarm\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTimestamp:    now,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPersonID:     personID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPersonName:   personName,\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif m.modeChangeBroadcaster != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tm.modeChangeBroadcaster.BroadcastSystemModeChange(event)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif m.onModeChange != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tgo m.onModeChange(event)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: auto-disarm triggered - registered device %s seen (RSSI: %d)\", obs.DeviceMAC, obs.RSSIdBm)\n\t\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Update last seen times for registered devices\n\tfor _, obs := range observations {\n\t\tif _, isRegistered := registeredDevices[obs.DeviceMAC]; isRegistered {\n\t\t\tm.lastDeviceSeen[obs.DeviceMAC] = now\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// CheckAutoAway checks if all registered devices have been absent for the configured duration.\n// This should be called periodically.\nfunc (m *Manager) CheckAutoAway() {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Skip if no BLE provider or auto-away is disabled\n\tif m.blePresenceProvider == nil || !m.autoAwayConfig.Enabled {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Check if manual override is active\n\tif time.Now().Before(m.manualOverrideUntil) {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Don't auto-away if already away\n\tif m.systemMode == events.ModeAway {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Get all registered devices\n\tregisteredDevices, err := m.blePresenceProvider.GetAllRegisteredDevices()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: get registered devices for auto-away: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif len(registeredDevices) == 0 {\n\t\treturn // No registered devices, can't determine away status\n\t}\n\n\t// Check if all devices have been absent for the configured duration\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tallAbsent := true\n\n\tfor mac := range registeredDevices {\n\t\tlastSeen, exists := m.lastDeviceSeen[mac]\n\t\tif !exists || now.Sub(lastSeen) >= m.autoAwayConfig.AbsenceDuration {\n\t\t\t// Device not seen recently\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\t// At least one device is present\n\t\tallAbsent = false\n\t\tbreak\n\t}\n\n\tif allAbsent {\n\t\t// Auto-away\n\t\tprevMode := m.systemMode\n\t\tm.systemMode = events.ModeAway\n\n\t\tevent := events.SystemModeChangeEvent{\n\t\t\tPreviousMode: prevMode,\n\t\t\tNewMode:      events.ModeAway,\n\t\t\tReason:       \"auto_away\",\n\t\t\tTimestamp:    now,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif m.modeChangeBroadcaster != nil {\n\t\t\tm.modeChangeBroadcaster.BroadcastSystemModeChange(event)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif m.onModeChange != nil {\n\t\t\tgo m.onModeChange(event)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: auto-away activated - all BLE devices absent for %v\", m.autoAwayConfig.AbsenceDuration)\n\t}\n}\n\n// RunModeCheck starts the periodic auto-away check loop.\nfunc (m *Manager) RunModeCheck(ctx context.Context) {\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(m.modeCheckInterval)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\tm.CheckAutoAway()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetAutoAwayConfig returns the current auto-away configuration.\nfunc (m *Manager) GetAutoAwayConfig() AutoAwayConfig {\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer m.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn m.autoAwayConfig\n}\n\n// SetAutoAwayConfig updates the auto-away configuration.\nfunc (m *Manager) SetAutoAwayConfig(cfg AutoAwayConfig) {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n\tm.autoAwayConfig = cfg\n}\n\n// SetPersonProvider sets the person name provider for mode change events.\nfunc (m *Manager) SetPersonProvider(p PersonNameProvider) {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n\tm.personProvider = p\n}\n\n// GetSystemMode returns the current system mode.\nfunc (m *Manager) GetSystemMode() events.SystemMode {\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer m.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn m.systemMode\n}\n\n// SetSystemMode manually sets the system mode with a reason.\nfunc (m *Manager) SetSystemMode(mode events.SystemMode, reason string) error {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tprevMode := m.systemMode\n\tif prevMode == mode {\n\t\treturn nil // No change needed\n\t}\n\n\tm.systemMode = mode\n\n\t// Set manual override pause\n\tm.manualOverrideUntil = time.Now().Add(m.autoAwayConfig.ManualOverridePause)\n\n\tevent := events.SystemModeChangeEvent{\n\t\tPreviousMode: prevMode,\n\t\tNewMode:      mode,\n\t\tReason:       reason,\n\t\tTimestamp:    time.Now(),\n\t}\n\n\tif m.modeChangeBroadcaster != nil {\n\t\tm.modeChangeBroadcaster.BroadcastSystemModeChange(event)\n\t}\n\n\tif m.onModeChange != nil {\n\t\tgo m.onModeChange(event)\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: system mode changed: %s -> %s (reason: %s)\", prevMode, mode, reason)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// SetOnModeChange sets the callback for mode change events.\nfunc (m *Manager) SetOnModeChange(cb func(events.SystemModeChangeEvent)) {\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n\tm.onModeChange = cb\n}\n\n// IsSecurityMode returns true if the system is in away mode (security mode).\nfunc (m *Manager) IsSecurityMode() bool {\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer m.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn m.systemMode == events.ModeAway\n}\n\n// IsManualOverrideActive returns true if a manual mode override is currently active.\nfunc (m *Manager) IsManualOverrideActive() bool {\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer m.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn time.Now().Before(m.manualOverrideUntil)\n}\n\n// GetConnectedMACs returns the MACs of currently-connected nodes.\n// Delegates to the NodeStateNotifier.\nfunc (m *Manager) GetConnectedMACs() []string {\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer m.mu.RUnlock()\n\tif m.notifier == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\treturn m.notifier.GetConnectedMACs()\n}\n\n// ─── Collision Detection & Adaptive Re-Stagger ─────────────────────────────────\n\n// GetCollisionDetector returns the collision detector for integration with ingestion.\nfunc (m *Manager) GetCollisionDetector() *CollisionDetector {\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer m.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn m.collisionDetector\n}\n\n// checkCollisions checks the collision rate and triggers re-stagger if needed.\nfunc (m *Manager) checkCollisions() {\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tcd := m.collisionDetector\n\tm.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif cd != nil {\n\t\tcd.CheckAndTriggerRestagger()\n\t}\n}\n\n// AdaptiveRestagger performs adaptive re-stagger of TX slot assignments.\n// This is called when the collision rate exceeds the threshold.\nfunc (m *Manager) AdaptiveRestagger() {\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: Performing adaptive re-stagger due to high collision rate\")\n\n\tm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif m.notifier == nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] fleet: Cannot re-stagger - no notifier configured\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Get current TX nodes\n\ttxMACs := make([]string, 0, len(m.txNodes))\n\tfor _, mac := range m.txNodes {\n\t\tif _, online := m.online[mac]; online {\n\t\t\ttxMACs = append(txMACs, mac)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(txMACs) < 2 {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] fleet: Skipping re-stagger - fewer than 2 TX nodes\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Generate new stagger offsets\n\trateHz := 20 // Default rate Hz\n\tnewOffsets := GetRestaggerOffsets(txMACs, rateHz)\n\n\t// Push updated config to all TX nodes\n\tfor _, mac := range txMACs {\n\t\ttxSlotUS := newOffsets[mac]\n\t\tm.notifier.SendConfigToMAC(mac, rateHz, txSlotUS, 0.02)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: Re-staggered %s to tx_slot_us=%d\", mac, txSlotUS)\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] fleet: Adaptive re-stagger complete - %d TX nodes updated\", len(txMACs))\n}\n\n// updateTXNodeCollisionTracking updates the collision detector's TX node registration\n// when a node's role changes.\nfunc (m *Manager) updateTXNodeCollisionTracking(mac string, role string) {\n\tm.mu.RLock()\n\tcd := m.collisionDetector\n\tm.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif cd == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Unregister first (in case role is changing)\n\tcd.UnregisterTXNode(mac)\n\n\t// Register as TX if role is tx or tx_rx\n\tif role == \"tx\" || role == \"tx_rx\" {\n\t\tcd.RegisterTXNode(mac)\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateTXNodeCollisionTrackingLocked updates the collision detector's TX node registration\n// when a node's role changes. Caller must hold m.mu.\nfunc (m *Manager) updateTXNodeCollisionTrackingLocked(mac string, role string) {\n\tcd := m.collisionDetector\n\tif cd == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Unregister first (in case role is changing)\n\tcd.UnregisterTXNode(mac)\n\n\t// Register as TX if role is tx or tx_rx\n\tif role == \"tx\" || role == \"tx_rx\" {\n\t\tcd.RegisterTXNode(mac)\n\t}\n}\n","numLines":810,"startLine":1,"totalLines":810}}}

    // CLEAR, POSSIBLY_PRESENT, MOTION_DETECTED, STATIONARY_DETECTED\n73\t\tBreathingFreqHz *float64 `json:\"breathing_freq_hz,omitempty\"` // Breathing frequency in Hz, null if not store.\n78\ttype ReplayAppender interface {\n79\t\tAppend(recvTimeNS int64, rawFrame []byte) error\n80\t}\n81\t\n82\t// Recorder records raw CSI frames to per-link segment files.\n83\ttype Recorder interface {\n84\t\tWrite(linkID string, frame []byte)\n85\t}\n86\t\n87\t// BLEHandler handles incoming BLE scan data from nodes.\n88\ttype BLEHandler func(nodeMAC string, devices []BLEDevice)\n89\t\n90\t// Server manages WebSocket connections from ESP32 nodes\n91\ttype Server struct {\n92\t\tmu          sync.RWMutex\n93\t\tconnections map[string]*NodeConnection // keyed by MAC\n94\t\tlinks       map[string]*RingBuffer     // keyed by \"nodeMAC:peerMAC\"\n95\t\n96\t\t// Motion state per link (for change detection and state queries)\n97\t\tlinkMotionState map[string]bool    // linkID -> motionDetected\n98\t\tlinkDeltaRMS    map[string]float64 // linkID -> smoothDeltaRMS\n99\t\n100\t\t// Malformed frame tracking per connection\n101\t\tmalformedCounts map[string]*malformedCounter\n102\t\n103\t\t// WebSocket upgrader\n104\t\tupgrader websocket.Upgrader\n105\t\n106\t\t// Shutdown state\n107\t\tshutdown bool\n108\t\n109\t\t// Optional pipeline components (set via setters)\n110\t\tdashboardBroadcaster CSIBroadcaster\n111\t\tmotionBroadcaster    MotionBroadcaster\n112\t\teventBroadcaster    EventBroadcaster\n113\t\tprocessorMgr         *signal.ProcessorManager\n114\t\treplayStore          ReplayAppender\n115\t\trecorder             Recorder\n116\t\trateCtrl             *RateController\n117\t\tfleetNotifier collision detection\n123\t\t// Interface type to avoid circular import\n124\t\tcollisionDetector interface {\n125\t\t\tRegisterTXNode(mac string)\n126\t\t\tUnregisterTXNode(mac string)\n127\t\t\tRecordFrameArrival(txMAC, linkID string, recvTime time.Time)\n128\t\t}\n129\t\n130\t\t// Load shedding\n131\t\tshedder    *loadshed.Shedder\n132\t\tframeGauge chan struct{} // bounded gauge for tracking in-flight frames\n133\t\n134\t\t// Token validator for node authentication\n135\t\t// Function that takes (mac, token) and returns true if valid\n136\t\ttokenValidator func(mac, token string) bool\n137\t\n138\t\t// migrationDeadline is the time after which nodes without valid tokens are rejected.\n139\t\t// Zero value means strict mode (no migration window).\n140\t\tmigrationDeadline time.Time\n141\t}\n142\t\n143\t// NodeConnection tracks state for a connected node\n144\ttype NodeConnection struct {\n145\t\tMAC            string\n146\t\tConn           *websocket.Conn\n147\t\tHello          *HelloMessage\n148\t\tLastHealth     *HealthMessage\n149\t\tLastHealthTime time.Time\n150\t\tConnectedAt    time.Time\n151\t\tLastFrameTime sync.Mutex\n156\t}\n157\t\n158\t// malformedCounter tracks malformed frame counts for rate limiting\n159\ttype malformedCounter struct {\n160\t\tcount     int\n161\t\tfirstSeen time.Time\n162\t}\n163\t\n164\tconst (\n165\t\t// Ping/pong timing\n166\t\tpingInterval = 30 * time.Second\n167\t\treadDeadline = 60 * time.Second\n168\t\n169\t\t// Malformed frame thresholds\n170\t\t// WARN logged when count exceeds 100 within the window\n171\t\t// Connection closed when count exceeds 1000 within the window\n172\t\tmalformedWarnThreshold  = 100\n173\t\tmalformedCloseThreshold = 1000\n174\t\tmalformedWindow         = time.Minute\n175\t\n176\t\t// Frame gauge buffer size for load shedding fullness detection.\n177\t\tframeGaugeSize = 256\n178\t)\n179\t\n180\t// NewServer creates a new ingestion server\n181\tfunc NewServer() *Server {\n182\t\treturn &Server{\n183\t\t\tconnections:     make(map[string]*NodeConnection),\n184\t\t\tlinks:           make(map[string]*RingBuffer),\n185\t\t\tlinkMotionState: make(map[string]bool),\n186\t\t\tlinkDeltaRMS: 512,\n195\t\t\t},\n196\t\t}\n197\t}\n198\t\n199\t// writeWSMessage sends a WebSocket message with error logging.\n200\t// Returns true if successful, false otherwise.\n201\tfunc writeWSMessage(conn Used by the load shedder to decide whether to drop CSI frames.\n335\tfunc (s *Server) isChannelOverHalfFull() bool {\n336\t\treturn len(s.frameGauge) > frameGaugeSize/2\n337\t}\n338\t\n339\t// {\n430\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n431\t\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()\n432\t\tmacs := make([]string, 0, len(s.connections))\n433\t\tfor mac := range s.connections {\n434\t\t\tmacs = append(macs, mac)\n435\t\t}\n436\t\treturn macs\n437\t}\n438\t\n439\t// IsNodeConnected returns true if the node with the given MAC is currently connected.\n440\tfunc (s *Server) IsNodeConnected(mac string) bool {\n441\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n442\t\t_, ok := s.connections[mac]\n443\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n444\t\treturn ok\n445\t}\n446\t\n447\t// HandleNodeWS handles WebSocket connections at /ws/node\n448\tfunc (s *Server) HandleNodeWS(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n449\t\t// Step 1 of shutdown: return HTTP 503 for new WebSocket upgrade requests\n450\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n451\t\tshuttingDown := s.shutdown\n452\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n453\t\n454\t\tif shuttingDown {\n455\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Rejecting new node connection during shutdown (HTTP 503)\")\n456\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n457\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\n458\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(`{\"error\":\"mothership shutting down\",\"code\":\"shutting_down\"}`))\n459\t\t\treturn\n460\t\t}\n461\t\n462\t\tconn, err := s.upgrader.Upgrade(w, r, nil)\n463\t\tif err != nil {\n464\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] WebSocket upgrade failed: %v\", err)\n465\t\t\treturn\n466\t\t}\n467\t\n468\t\tconn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(readDeadline))\n469\t\n470\t\tnc := &NodeConnection{\n471\t\t\tConn:        conn,\n472\t\t\tConnectedAt: time.Now(),\n473\t\t}\n474\t\n475\t\t_, msg, err := conn.ReadMessage()\n476\t\tif err != nil {\n477\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to read hello: %v\", err)\n478\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n479\t\t\treturn\n480\t\t}\n481\t\n482\t\tparsed, err := ParseJSONMessage(msg)\n483\t\tif err != nil {\n484\t\t\ts.sendReject(conn, \"invalid hello format\")\n485\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n486\t\t\treturn\n487\t\t}\n488\t\n489\t\thello, ok := parsed.(*HelloMessage)\n490\t\tif !ok {\n491\t\t\ts.sendReject(conn, \"expected hello first\")\n492\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n493\t\t\treturn\n494\t\t}\n495\t\n496\t\tnc.MAC = hello.MAC\n497\t\tnc.Hello = hello\n498\t\n499\t\t// Token validation: if a validator is configured, reject unauthenticated nodes\n500\t\t// unless the migration window is still open, in which case allow but mark as Unpaired.\n501\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n502\t\tvalidator := s.tokenValidator\n503\t\tdeadline := s.migrationDeadline\n504\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n505\t\tif validator != nil {\n506\t\t\ttokenOK := hello.Token != \"\" && validator(hello.MAC, hello.Token)\n507\t\t\tif !tokenOK {\n508\t\t\t\tif !deadline.IsZero() && time.Now().Before(deadline) {\n509\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Node %s connected without valid token (migration window open until %s)\",\n510\t\t\t\t\t\thello.MAC, deadline.Format(time.RFC3339))\n511\t\t\t\t\tnc.Unpaired = true\n512\t\t\t\t} else {\n513\t\t\t\t\tif hello.Token == \"\" {\n514\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Node %s rejected: missing token\", hello.MAC)\n515\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n516\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Node %s rejected: invalid token\", hello.MAC)\n517\t\t\t\t\t}\n518\t\t\t\t\ts.sendReject(conn, \"invalid_token\")\n519\t\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n520\t\t\t\t\treturn\n521\t\t\t\t}\n522\t\t\t}\n523\t\t}\n524\t\n525\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n526\t\tif existing, exists := s.connections[hello.MAC]; exists {\n527\t\t\texisting.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n528\t\t}\n529\t\ts.connections[hello.MAC] = nc\n530\t\ts.malformedCounts[hello.MAC] = &malformedCounter{}\n531\t\tbroadcaster := s.dashboardBroadcaster\n532\t\tfleetFn := s.fleetNotifier\n533\t\tapDet := s.apDetector\n534\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n535\t\n536\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Node connected: MAC=%s firmware=%s chip=%s\",\n537\t\t\thello.MAC, hello.FirmwareVersion, hello.Chip)\n538\t\n539\t\t// Process AP BSSID for passive radar auto-detection\n540\t\tif apDet != nil {\n541\t\t\tif err := apDet.ProcessHello(hello.MAC, hello.APBSSID, hello.APChannel); err != nil {\n542\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] AP detector process hello failed: %v\", err)\n543\t\t\t}\n544\t\t}\n545\t\n546\t\tif broadcaster != nil {\n547\t\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastNodeConnected(hello.MAC, hello.FirmwareVersion, hello.Chip, nc.Unpaired)\n548\t\t}\n549\t\n550\t\tif fleetFn != nil {\n551\t\t\tfleetFn.OnNodeConnected(hello.MAC, hello.FirmwareVersion, hello.Chip)\n552\t\t} else {\n553\t\t\ts.sendRole(nc, \"rx\", \"\")\n554\t\t\ts.sendConfig(nc, RateIdle, 0, DefaultVarianceThreshold, \"\")\n555\t\t}\n556\t\n557\t\t// Notify OTA manager of reconnection (for rollback detection)\n558\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n559\t\totaH := s.otaHandler\n560\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n561\t\tif otaH != nil {\n562\t\t\totaH.OnNodeReconnected(hello.MAC, hello.FirmwareVersion)\n563\t\t}\n564\t\n565\t\tgo s.pingLoop(nc)\n566\t\ts.handleMessages(nc)\n567\t}\n568\t\n569\t// handleMessages processes incoming WebSocket messages\n570\tfunc (s *Server) handleMessages(nc *NodeConnection) {\n571\t\tdefer func() {\n572\t\t\tnc.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n573\t\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n574\t\t\tdelete(s.connections, nc.MAC)\n575\t\t\tdelete(s.malformedCounts, nc.MAC)\n576\t\t\tbroadcaster := s.dashboardBroadcaster\n577\t\t\trateCtrl := s.rateCtrl\n578\t\t\tfleetFn := s.fleetNotifier\n579\t\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n580\t\n581\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Node disconnected: MAC=%s\", nc.MAC)\n582\t\n583\t\t\tif broadcaster != nil {\n584\t\t\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastNodeDisconnected(nc.MAC)\n585\t\t\t}\n586\t\t\tif rateCtrl != nil {\n587\t\t\t\trateCtrl.OnNodeDisconnected(nc.MAC)\n588\t\t\t}\n589\t\t\tif fleetFn != nil {\n590\t\t\t\tfleetFn.OnNodeDisconnected(nc.MAC)\n591\t\t\t}\n592\t\t}()\n593\t\n594\t\tfor {\n595\t\t\tnc.Conn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(readDeadline))\n596\t\n597\t\t\tmessageType, data, err := nc.Conn.ReadMessage()\n598\t\t\tif err != nil {\n599\t\t\t\tif websocket.IsUnexpectedCloseError(err, websocket.CloseGoingAway, websocket.CloseAbnormalClosure) {\n600\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Unexpected close from %s: %v\", nc.MAC, err)\n601\t\t\t\t}\n602\t\t\t\treturn\n603\t\t\t}\n604\t\n605\t\t\tif messageType == websocket.BinaryMessage {\n606\t\t\t\ts.handleBinaryFrame(nc, data)\n607\t\t\t} else if messageType == websocket.TextMessage {\n608\t\t\t\ts.handleJSONMessage(nc, data)\n609\t\t\t}\n610\t\t}\n611\t}\n612\t\n613\t// handleBinaryFrame processes a CSI binary frame\n614\tfunc (s *Server) handleBinaryFrame(nc *NodeConnection, data []byte) {\n615\t\t// Load shedding Level 3: drop frames when ingest channel > 50% full.\n616\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n617\t\tsh := s.shedder\n618\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n619\t\tif sh != nil && sh.ShouldDropFrames() {\n620\t\t\treturn\n621\t\t}\n622\t\n623\t\tframe, err := ParseFrame(data)\n624\t\tif err != nil {\n625\t\t\ts.recordMalformed(nc.MAC)\n626\t\t\treturn\n627\t\t}\n628\t\n629\t\tnc.LastFrameTime = time.Now()\n630\t\trecvTime := nc.LastFrameTime\n631\t\n632\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n633\t\treplay := s.replayStore\n634\t\trec := s.recorder\n635\t\tpm := s.processorMgr\n636\t\tcd := s.collisionDetector\n637\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n638\t\n639\t\t// 1. Record raw frame to disk before any processing.\n640\t\t// Load shedding Level 2+: suspend CSI replay buffer writes.\n641\t\tif replay != nil && (sh == nil || sh.ShouldWriteReplay()) {\n642\t\t\tif err := replay.Append(recvTime.UnixNano(), data); err != nil {\n643\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Replay append error: %v\", err)\n644\t\t\t}\n645\t\t}\n646\t\tif rec != nil {\n647\t\t\trec.Write(frame.LinkID(), data)\n648\t\t}\n649\t\n650\t\t// Record frame arrival for collision detection (TX node is peer_mac)\n651\t\tif cd != nil {\n652\t\t\t// The TX node is the peer_mac (the transmitter)\n653\t\t\ttxMAC := frame.PeerMACString()\n654\t\t\tcd.RecordFrameArrival(txMAC, frame.LinkID(), recvTime)\n655\t\t}\n656\t\n657\t\t// 2. Get or create ring buffer.\n658\t\tlinkID := frame.LinkID()\n659\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n660\t\tring, exists := s.links[linkID]\n661\t\tisNewLink := !exists\n662\t\tif !exists {\n663\t\t\tring = NewRingBuffer()\n664\t\t\ts.links[linkID] = ring\n665\t\t}\n666\t\tbroadcaster := s.dashboardBroadcaster\n667\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n668\t\n669\t\tring.Push(frame, recvTime)\n670\t\n671\t\tif broadcaster != nil {\n672\t\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastCSI(frame.MACString(), frame.PeerMACString(), data)\n673\t\t\tif isNewLink {\n674\t\t\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastLinkActive(linkID, frame.MACString(), frame.PeerMACString())\n675\t\t\t}\n676\t\t}\n677\t\n678\t\t// 3. Signal processing pipeline.\n679\t\tif pm != nil && int(frame.NSub) > 0 {\n680\t\t\tresult, err := pm.Process(linkID, frame.Payload, frame.RSSI, int(frame.NSub), recvTime)\n681\t\t\tif err != nil {\n682\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] Signal processing error for %s: %v\", linkID, err)\n683\t\t\t\treturn\n684\t\t\t}\n685\t\n686\t\t\tmotionDetected := result.Features.MotionDetected\n687\t\t\tdeltaRMS := result.Features.SmoothDeltaRMS\n688\t\n689\t\t\t// Check if motion state changed.\n690\t\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n691\t\t\tprev := s.linkMotionState[linkID]\n692\t\t\tstateChanged := prev != motionDetected\n693\t\t\ts.linkMotionState[linkID] = motionDetected\n694\t\t\ts.linkDeltaRMS[linkID] = deltaRMS\n695\t\t\tmb := s.motionBroadcaster\n696\t\t\trateCtrl := s.rateCtrl\n697\t\t\teb := s.eventBroadcaster\n698\t\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n699\t\n700\t\t\tif stateChanged {\n701\t\t\t\tif mb != nil {\n702\t\t\t\t\tmb.BroadcastMotionState([]MotionStateItem{{\n703\t\t\t\t\t\tLinkID:         linkID,\n704\t\t\t\t\t\tMotionDetected: motionDetected,\n705\t\t\t\t\t\tDeltaRMS:       deltaRMS,\n706\t\t\t\t\t}})\n707\t\t\t\t}\n708\t\t\t\t// Broadcast presence transition event to dashboard.\n709\t\t\t\tif eb != nil {\n710\t\t\t\t\teb.BroadcastEvent(\n711\t\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"presence:%s:%d\", linkID, time.Now().UnixMilli()),\n712\t\t\t\t\t\ttime.Now(),\n713\t\t\t\t\t\t\"presence_transition\",\n714\t\t\t\t\t\tlinkID,\n715\t\t\t\t\t\t0,\n716\t\t\t\t\t\t\"\",\n717\t\t\t\t\t)\n718\t\t\t\t}\n719\t\t\t}\n720\t\n721\t\t\tif rateCtrl != nil {\n722\t\t\t\trateCtrl.OnMotionState(nc.MAC, motionDetected)\n723\t\t\t}\n724\t\t}\n725\t}\n726\t\n727\t// handleJSONMessage processes a JSON control message\n728\tfunc (s *Server) handleJSONMessage(nc *NodeConnection, data []byte) {\n729\t\tparsed, err := ParseJSONMessage(data)\n730\t\tif err != nil {\n731\t\t\treturn\n732\t\t}\n733\t\n734\t\tswitch msg := parsed.(type) {\n735\t\tcase *HealthMessage:\n736\t\t\tnc.LastHealth = msg\n737\t\t\tnc.LastHealthTime = time.Now()\n738\t\n739\t\tcase *BLEMessage:\n740\t\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n741\t\t\thandler := s.bleHandler\n742\t\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n743\t\t\tif handler != nil {\n744\t\t\t\thandler(nc.MAC, msg.Devices)\n745\t\t\t}\n746\t\n747\t\tcase *MotionHintMessage:\n748\t\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n749\t\t\trateCtrl := s.rateCtrl\n750\t\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n751\t\t\tif rateCtrl != nil {\n752\t\t\t\trateCtrl.OnMotionHint(nc.MAC)\n753\t\t\t}\n754\t\n755\t\tcase *OTAStatusMessage:\n756\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] OTA %s from %s: state=%s progress=%d%%\",\n757\t\t\t\tmsg.Type, nc.MAC, msg.State, msg.ProgressPct)\n758\t\t\tif msg.Error != \"\" {\n759\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] OTA error from %s: %s\", nc.MAC, msg.Error)\n760\t\t\t}\n761\t\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n762\t\t\totaH := s.otaHandler\n763\t\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n764\t\t\tif otaH != nil {\n765\t\t\t\totaH.OnOTAStatus(nc.MAC, msg.State, uint8(msg.ProgressPct), msg.Error)\n766\t\t\t}\n767\t\t}\n768\t}\n769\t\n770\t// recordMalformed tracks malformed frames and closes connection if threshold exceeded\n771\tfunc (s *Server) recordMalformed(mac string) {\n772\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n773\t\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()\n774\t\n775\t\tcounter, exists := s.malformedCounts[mac]\n776\t\tif !exists {\n777\t\t\treturn\n778\t\t}\n779\t\n780\t\t// Log at DEBUG level for each validation failure\n781\t\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] Node %s sent malformed CSI frame (count in window: %d)\", mac, counter.count+1)\n782\t\n783\t\t// Reset counter if window has expired (sliding 60-second window)\n784\t\tif time.Since(counter.firstSeen) > malformedWindow {\n785\t\t\tcounter.count = 0\n786\t\t\tcounter.firstSeen = time.Now()\n787\t\t}\n788\t\n789\t\tcounter.count++\n790\t\n791\t\t// Log WARN when count exceeds 100 within the window\n792\t\tif counter.count > malformedWarnThreshold && counter.count <= malformedWarnThreshold+1 {\n793\t\t\t// Only log once when crossing the threshold to avoid spam\n794\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Node %s sent %d malformed frames in 60s\", mac, counter.count)\n795\t\t}\n796\t\n797\t\t// Close connection when count exceeds 1000 within the window\n798\t\tif counter.count > malformedCloseThreshold {\n799\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Node %s sent %d malformed frames in 60s — closing connection: Excessive malformed frames — possible firmware bug\", mac, counter.count)\n800\t\t\tif nc, exists := s.connections[mac]; exists {\n801\t\t\t\tnc.writeMu.Lock()\n802\t\t\t\t// Send close message with specific error text\n803\t\t\t\tnc.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.CloseMessage,\n804\t\t\t\t\twebsocket.FormatCloseMessage(websocket.ClosePolicyViolation, \"Excessive malformed frames — possible firmware bug\"))\n805\t\t\t\tnc.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n806\t\t\t\tnc.writeMu.Unlock()\n807\t\t\t}\n808\t\t}\n809\t}\n810\t\n811\t// pingLoop sends periodic ping frames to keep the connection alive\n812\tfunc (s *Server) pingLoop(nc *NodeConnection) {\n813\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(pingInterval)\n814\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n815\t\n816\t\tfor range ticker.C {\n817\t\t\tnc.writeMu.Lock()\n818\t\t\terr := nc.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.PingMessage, nil)\n819\t\t\tnc.writeMu.Unlock()\n820\t\n821\t\t\tif err != nil {\n822\t\t\t\treturn\n823\t\t\t}\n824\t\n825\t\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n826\t\t\tshutdown := s.shutdown\n827\t\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n828\t\t\tif shutdown {\n829\t\t\t\treturn\n830\t\t\t}\n831\t\t}\n832\t}\n833\t\n834\t// sendReject sends a reject message and closes the connection\n835\tfunc (s *Server) sendReject(conn *websocket.Conn, reason string) {\n836\t\tmsg := RejectMessage{Type: \"reject\", Reason: reason}\n837\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n838\t\tconn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, data)\n839\t}\n840\t\n841\t// sendRole sends a role assignment to a node\n842\tfunc (s *Server) sendRole(nc *NodeConnection, role string, passiveBSSID string) {\n843\t\tmsg := RoleMessage{Type: \"role\", Role: role, PassiveBSSID: passiveBSSID}\n844\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n845\t\n846\t\tnc.writeMu.Lock()\n847\t\tnc.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, data)\n848\t\tnc.writeMu.Unlock()\n849\t}\n850\t\n851\t// sendConfig sends configuration to a node\n852\tfunc (s *Server) sendConfig(nc *NodeConnection, rateHz int, txSlotUS int, varianceThreshold float64, ntpServer string) {\n853\t\tmsg := ConfigMessage{Type: \"config\"}\n854\t\tif rateHz > 0 {\n855\t\t\tmsg.RateHz = &rateHz\n856\t\t}\n857\t\tif txSlotUS > 0 {\n858\t\t\tmsg.TXSlotUS = &txSlotUS\n859\t\t}\n860\t\tif varianceThreshold > 0 {\n861\t\t\tmsg.VarianceThreshold = &varianceThreshold\n862\t\t}\n863\t\tif ntpServer != \"\" {\n864\t\t\tmsg.NTPServer = &ntpServer\n865\t\t}\n866\t\tdata, _ := This causes HandleNodeWS to return HTTP 503\n874\t// for new connection attempts. Called as step 1 of the graceful shutdown sequence.\n875\tfunc (s *Server) SetShuttingDown() {\n876\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n877\t\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()\n878\t\ts.shutdown = true\n879\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Ingestion server set to shutting down (HTTP 503 for new connections)\")\n880\t}\n881\t\n882\t// Shutdown gracefully shuts down the server\n883\tfunc (s *Server) Shutdown(ctx context.Context) {\n884\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n885\t\ts.shutdown = true\n886\t\n887\t\tshutdownMsg := ShutdownMessage{Type: \"shutdown\", ReconnectInMS: 30000}\n888\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(shutdownMsg)\n889\t\n890\t\tfor mac, nc := range s.connections {\n891\t\t\tnc.writeMu.Lock()\n892\t\t\tnc.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, data)\n893\t\t\tnc.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n894\t\t\tnc.writeMu.Unlock()\n895\t\t\tdelete(s.connections, mac)\n896\t\t}\n897\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n898\t\n899\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Ingestion server shutdown complete\")\n900\t}\n901\t\n902\t// CloseAllConnections closes all node WebSocket connections with normal close frame.\n903\t// This implements the shutdown.NodeConnectionCloser interface.\n904\tfunc (s *Server) CloseAllConnections() error {\n905\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n906\t\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()\n907\t\n908\t\tfor mac, nc := range s.connections {\n909\t\t\tnc.writeMu.Lock()\n910\t\t\t// Send normal close frame (1000)\n911\t\t\tnc.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.CloseMessage,\n912\t\t\t\twebsocket.FormatCloseMessage(websocket.CloseNormalClosure, \"mothership shutting down\"))\n913\t\t\tnc.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n914\t\t\tnc.writeMu.Unlock()\n915\t\t\tdelete(s.connections, mac)\n916\t\t}\n917\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] All node connections closed\")\n918\t\treturn nil\n919\t}\n920\t\n921\t// GetConnectedNodes returns a list of connected node MACs\n922\tfunc (s *Server) GetConnectedNodes() []string {\n923\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n924\t\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()\n925\t\n926\t\tmacs := make([]string, 0, len(s.connections))\n927\t\tfor mac := range s.connections {\n928\t\t\tmacs = append(macs, mac)\n929\t\t}\n930\t\treturn macs\n931\t}\n932\t\n933\t// NodeInfo represents a connected node's state for dashboard\n934\ttype NodeInfo struct {\n935\t\tMAC             string `json:\"mac\"`\n936\t\tFirmwareVersion string `json:\"firmware_version,omitempty\"`\n937\t\tChip            string            `json:\"health_score\"`\n990\t\tHealthDetails signal.HealthDetails `json:\"health_details\"`\n991\t\tLastUpdated   time.Time            `json:\"last_updated\"`\n992\t}\n993\t\n994\t// GetAllLinksInfo returns detailed info about all active links\n995\tfunc (s *Server) GetAllLinksInfo() []LinkInfo {\n996\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n997\t\tpm := s.processorMgr\n998\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n999\t\n1000\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n1001\t\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()\n1002\t\n1003\t\tlinks := make([]LinkInfo, 0, len(s.links))\n1004\t\tfor linkID := range s.links {\n1005\t\t\tif len(linkID) >= 35 {\n1006\t\t\t\tinfo := LinkInfo{\n1007\t\t\t\t\tID:      linkID,\n1008\t\t\t\t\tNodeMAC: linkID[:17],\n1009\t\t\t\t\tPeerMAC: linkID[18:],\n1010\t\t\t\t\tLinkID:  linkID, // Alias for frontend\n1011\t\t\t\t}\n1012\t\n1013\t\t\t\t// Get health score from processor manager if available\n1014\t\t\t\tif pm != nil {\n1015\t\t\t\t\tif proc := pm.GetProcessor(linkID); GetAllMotionStates returns current motion state for all known links.\n1032\tfunc (s *Server) GetAllMotionStates() []MotionStateItem {\n1033\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n1034\t\tpm := s.processorMgr\n1035\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n1036\t\n1037\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n1038\t\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()\n1039\t\n1040\t\tstates := make([]MotionStateItem, 0, len(s.linkMotionState))\n1041\t\tfor linkID, Phase 6: Add breathing/dwell state\n1053\t\t\t\t\tdwellState := proc.GetDwellState()\n1054\t\t\t\t\titem.BreathingState = dwellState.String()\n1055\t\t\t\t\tbpm := handles WebSocket connections at /ws/node\nfunc (s *Server) HandleNodeWS(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t// Step 1 of shutdown: return HTTP 503 for new WebSocket upgrade requests\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\tshuttingDown := s.shutdown\n\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif shuttingDown {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Rejecting new node connection during shutdown (HTTP 503)\")\n\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\n\t\tw.Write([]byte(`{\"error\":\"mothership shutting down\",\"code\":\"shutting_down\"}`))\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tconn, err := s.upgrader.Upgrade(w, r, nil)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] WebSocket upgrade failed: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tconn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(readDeadline))\n\n\tnc := &NodeConnection{\n\t\tConn:        conn,\n\t\tConnectedAt: time.Now(),\n\t}\n\n\t_, msg, err := conn.ReadMessage()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to read hello: %v\", err)\n\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tparsed, err := ParseJSONMessage(msg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\ts.sendReject(conn, \"invalid hello format\")\n\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\thello, ok := parsed.(*HelloMessage)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\ts.sendReject(conn, \"expected hello first\")\n\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tnc.MAC = hello.MAC\n\tnc.Hello = hello\n\n\t// Token validation: if a validator is configured, reject unauthenticated nodes\n\t// unless the migration window is still open, in which case allow but mark as Unpaired.\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\tvalidator := s.tokenValidator\n\tdeadline := s.migrationDeadline\n\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\tif validator != nil {\n\t\ttokenOK := hello.Token != \"\" && validator(hello.MAC, hello.Token)\n\t\tif !tokenOK {\n\t\t\tif !deadline.IsZero() && time.Now().Before(deadline) {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Node %s connected without valid token (migration window open until %s)\",\n\t\t\t\t\thello.MAC, deadline.Format(time.RFC3339))\n\t\t\t\tnc.Unpaired = true\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tif hello.Token == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Node %s rejected: missing token\", hello.MAC)\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Node %s rejected: invalid token\", hello.MAC)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\ts.sendReject(conn, \"invalid_token\")\n\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\ts.mu.Lock()\n\tif existing, exists := s.connections[hello.MAC]; exists {\n\t\texisting.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t}\n\ts.connections[hello.MAC] = nc\n\ts.malformedCounts[hello.MAC] = &malformedCounter{}\n\tbroadcaster := s.dashboardBroadcaster\n\tfleetFn := s.fleetNotifier\n\tapDet := s.apDetector\n\ts.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Node connected: MAC=%s firmware=%s chip=%s\",\n\t\thello.MAC, hello.FirmwareVersion, hello.Chip)\n\n\t// Process AP BSSID for passive radar auto-detection\n\tif apDet != nil {\n\t\tif err := apDet.ProcessHello(hello.MAC, hello.APBSSID, hello.APChannel); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] AP detector process hello failed: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif broadcaster != nil {\n\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastNodeConnected(hello.MAC, hello.FirmwareVersion, hello.Chip, nc.Unpaired)\n\t}\n\n\tif fleetFn != nil {\n\t\tfleetFn.OnNodeConnected(hello.MAC, hello.FirmwareVersion, hello.Chip)\n\t} else {\n\t\ts.sendRole(nc, \"rx\", \"\")\n\t\ts.sendConfig(nc, RateIdle, 0, DefaultVarianceThreshold, \"\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Notify OTA manager of reconnection (for rollback detection)\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\totaH := s.otaHandler\n\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\tif otaH != nil {\n\t\totaH.OnNodeReconnected(hello.MAC, hello.FirmwareVersion)\n\t}\n\n\tgo s.pingLoop(nc)\n\ts.handleMessages(nc)\n}\n\n// handleMessages processes incoming WebSocket messages\nfunc (s *Server) handleMessages(nc *NodeConnection) {\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tnc.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n\t\tdelete(s.connections, nc.MAC)\n\t\tdelete(s.malformedCounts, nc.MAC)\n\t\tbroadcaster := s.dashboardBroadcaster\n\t\trateCtrl := s.rateCtrl\n\t\tfleetFn := s.fleetNotifier\n\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Node disconnected: MAC=%s\", nc.MAC)\n\n\t\tif broadcaster != nil {\n\t\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastNodeDisconnected(nc.MAC)\n\t\t}\n\t\tif rateCtrl != nil {\n\t\t\trateCtrl.OnNodeDisconnected(nc.MAC)\n\t\t}\n\t\tif fleetFn != nil {\n\t\t\tfleetFn.OnNodeDisconnected(nc.MAC)\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tnc.Conn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(readDeadline))\n\n\t\tmessageType, data, err := nc.Conn.ReadMessage()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tif websocket.IsUnexpectedCloseError(err, websocket.CloseGoingAway, websocket.CloseAbnormalClosure) {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Unexpected close from %s: %v\", nc.MAC, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif messageType == websocket.BinaryMessage {\n\t\t\ts.handleBinaryFrame(nc, data)\n\t\t} else if messageType == websocket.TextMessage {\n\t\t\ts.handleJSONMessage(nc, data)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// handleBinaryFrame processes a CSI binary frame\nfunc (s *Server) handleBinaryFrame(nc *NodeConnection, data []byte) {\n\t// Load shedding Level 3: drop frames when ingest channel > 50% full.\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\tsh := s.shedder\n\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\tif sh != nil && sh.ShouldDropFrames() {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tframe, err := ParseFrame(data)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\ts.recordMalformed(nc.MAC)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tnc.LastFrameTime = time.Now()\n\trecvTime := nc.LastFrameTime\n\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\treplay := s.replayStore\n\trec := s.recorder\n\tpm := s.processorMgr\n\tcd := s.collisionDetector\n\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\t// 1. Record raw frame to disk before any processing.\n\t// Load shedding Level 2+: suspend CSI replay buffer writes.\n\tif replay != nil && (sh == nil || sh.ShouldWriteReplay()) {\n\t\tif err := replay.Append(recvTime.UnixNano(), data); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Replay append error: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif rec != nil {\n\t\trec.Write(frame.LinkID(), data)\n\t}\n\n\t// Record frame arrival for collision detection (TX node is peer_mac)\n\tif cd != nil {\n\t\t// The TX node is the peer_mac (the transmitter)\n\t\ttxMAC := frame.PeerMACString()\n\t\tcd.RecordFrameArrival(txMAC, frame.LinkID(), recvTime)\n\t}\n\n\t// 2. Get or create ring buffer.\n\tlinkID := frame.LinkID()\n\ts.mu.Lock()\n\tring, exists := s.links[linkID]\n\tisNewLink := !exists\n\tif !exists {\n\t\tring = NewRingBuffer()\n\t\ts.links[linkID] = ring\n\t}\n\tbroadcaster := s.dashboardBroadcaster\n\ts.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tring.Push(frame, recvTime)\n\n\tif broadcaster != nil {\n\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastCSI(frame.MACString(), frame.PeerMACString(), data)\n\t\tif isNewLink {\n\t\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastLinkActive(linkID, frame.MACString(), frame.PeerMACString())\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// 3. Signal processing pipeline.\n\tif pm != nil && int(frame.NSub) > 0 {\n\t\tresult, err := pm.Process(linkID, frame.Payload, frame.RSSI, int(frame.NSub), recvTime)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] Signal processing error for %s: %v\", linkID, err)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmotionDetected := result.Features.MotionDetected\n\t\tdeltaRMS := result.Features.SmoothDeltaRMS\n\n\t\t// Check if motion state changed.\n\t\ts.mu.Lock()\n\t\tprev := s.linkMotionState[linkID]\n\t\tstateChanged := prev != motionDetected\n\t\ts.linkMotionState[linkID] = motionDetected\n\t\ts.linkDeltaRMS[linkID] = deltaRMS\n\t\tmb := s.motionBroadcaster\n\t\trateCtrl := s.rateCtrl\n\t\teb := s.eventBroadcaster\n\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tif stateChanged {\n\t\t\tif mb != nil {\n\t\t\t\tmb.BroadcastMotionState([]MotionStateItem{{\n\t\t\t\t\tLinkID:         linkID,\n\t\t\t\t\tMotionDetected: motionDetected,\n\t\t\t\t\tDeltaRMS:       deltaRMS,\n\t\t\t\t}})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// Broadcast presence transition event to dashboard.\n\t\t\tif eb != nil {\n\t\t\t\teb.BroadcastEvent(\n\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"presence:%s:%d\", linkID, time.Now().UnixMilli()),\n\t\t\t\t\ttime.Now(),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"presence_transition\",\n\t\t\t\t\tlinkID,\n\t\t\t\t\t0,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"\",\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif rateCtrl != nil {\n\t\t\trateCtrl.OnMotionState(nc.MAC, motionDetected)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// handleJSONMessage processes a JSON control message\nfunc (s *Server) handleJSONMessage(nc *NodeConnection, data []byte) {\n\tparsed, err := ParseJSONMessage(data)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tswitch msg := parsed.(type) {\n\tcase *HealthMessage:\n\t\tnc.LastHealth = msg\n\t\tnc.LastHealthTime = time.Now()\n\n\tcase *BLEMessage:\n\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n\t\thandler := s.bleHandler\n\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\t\tif handler != nil {\n\t\t\thandler(nc.MAC, msg.Devices)\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase *MotionHintMessage:\n\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n\t\trateCtrl := s.rateCtrl\n\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\t\tif rateCtrl != nil {\n\t\t\trateCtrl.OnMotionHint(nc.MAC)\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase *OTAStatusMessage:\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] OTA %s from %s: state=%s progress=%d%%\",\n\t\t\tmsg.Type, nc.MAC, msg.State, msg.ProgressPct)\n\t\tif msg.Error != \"\" {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] OTA error from %s: %s\", nc.MAC, msg.Error)\n\t\t}\n\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n\t\totaH := s.otaHandler\n\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\t\tif otaH != nil {\n\t\t\totaH.OnOTAStatus(nc.MAC, msg.State, uint8(msg.ProgressPct), msg.Error)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// recordMalformed tracks malformed frames and closes connection if threshold exceeded\nfunc (s *Server) recordMalformed(mac string) {\n\ts.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tcounter, exists := s.malformedCounts[mac]\n\tif !exists {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Log at DEBUG level for each validation failure\n\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] Node %s sent malformed CSI frame (count in window: %d)\", mac, counter.count+1)\n\n\t// Reset counter if window has expired (sliding 60-second window)\n\tif time.Since(counter.firstSeen) > malformedWindow {\n\t\tcounter.count = 0\n\t\tcounter.firstSeen = time.Now()\n\t}\n\n\tcounter.count++\n\n\t// Log WARN when count exceeds 100 within the window\n\tif counter.count > malformedWarnThreshold && counter.count <= malformedWarnThreshold+1 {\n\t\t// Only log once when crossing the threshold to avoid spam\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Node %s sent %d malformed frames in 60s\", mac, counter.count)\n\t}\n\n\t// Close connection when count exceeds 1000 within the window\n\tif counter.count > malformedCloseThreshold {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Node %s sent %d malformed frames in 60s — closing connection: Excessive malformed frames — possible firmware bug\", mac, counter.count)\n\t\tif nc, exists := s.connections[mac]; exists {\n\t\t\tnc.writeMu.Lock()\n\t\t\t// Send close message with specific error text\n\t\t\tnc.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.CloseMessage,\n\t\t\t\twebsocket.FormatCloseMessage(websocket.ClosePolicyViolation, \"Excessive malformed frames — possible firmware bug\"))\n\t\t\tnc.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\tnc.writeMu.Unlock()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// pingLoop sends periodic ping frames to keep the connection alive\nfunc (s *Server) pingLoop(nc *NodeConnection) {\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(pingInterval)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tfor range ticker.C {\n\t\tnc.writeMu.Lock()\n\t\terr := nc.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.PingMessage, nil)\n\t\tnc.writeMu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ts.mu.RLock()\n\t\tshutdown := s.shutdown\n\t\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\t\tif shutdown {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// {\n292\t\t\treturn false\n293\t\t}\n294\t\n295\t\t// Rate-limit re-staggers to at most once per 30 seconds\n296\t\tif time.Since(cd.lastRestagger) < 30*time.Second {\n297\t\t\treturn {\n376\t\tcd.mu.RLock()\n377\t\tdefer cd.mu.RUnlock()\n378\t\n379\t\tvar allEvents []CollisionEvent\n380\t\tfor _, events := range cd.collisionHistory {\n381\t\t\tallEvents = append(allEvents, events...)\n382\t\t}\n383\t\n384\t\t// Sort by timestamp descending\n385\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(allEvents); i++ {\n386\t\t\tfor j := i + 1; j < len(allEvents); j++ {\n387\t\t\t\tif allEvents[j].Timestamp.After(allEvents[i].Timestamp) {\n388\t\t\t\t\tallEvents[i], allEvents[j] = allEvents[j], allEvents[i]\n389\t\t\t\t}\n390\t\t\t}\n391\t\t}\n392\t\n393\t\tif limit > 0 && len(allEvents) > limit {\n394\t\t\tallEvents = allEvents[:limit]\n395\t\t}\n396\t\n397\t\treturn allEvents\n398\t}\n399\t\n400\t// GenerateRestaggerOffset generates a new random stagger offset for a TX node\n401\t// This shifts one node's slot by a fraction of the slot width to break up collisions\n402\tfunc GenerateRestaggerOffset(txIndex, numTXNodes int, rateHz int) int {\n403\t\t// Calculate slot width in microseconds\n404\t\tslotWidthUS := 1_000_000 / (rateHz * numTXNodes)\n405\t\n406\t\t// Shift by a random fraction of the slot width (between 10% and 90%)\n407\t\t// This ensures nodes don't all align at the same time\n408\t\tfraction := 0.1 + rand.Float64()*0.8\n409\t\tshiftUS := int(float64(slotWidthUS) * fraction)\n410\t\n411\t\t// Calculate the base offset for this TX node\n412\t\tbaseOffsetUS := txIndex * (1_000_000 / (rateHz * numTXNodes))\n413\t\n414\t\t// Apply the shift\n415\t\tnewOffsetUS := baseOffsetUS + shiftUS\n416\t\n417\t\t// Ensure we don't exceed the period\n418\t\tmaxOffsetUS := 1_000_000 / rateHz\n419\t\tif newOffsetUS >= maxOffsetUS {\n420\t\t\tnewOffsetUS = newOffsetUS % maxOffsetUS\n421\t\t}\n422\t\n423\t\treturn newOffsetUS\n424\t}\n425\t\n426\t// GetRestaggerOffsets generates new stagger offsets for all TX nodes\n427\t// Returns a map of MAC address to tx_slot_us value\n428\tfunc GetRestaggerOffsets(txMACs []string, rateHz int) map[string]int {\n429\t\tnumTX := len(txMACs)\n430\t\toffsets := make(map[string]int)\n431\t\n432\t\tfor i, mac := range txMACs {\n433\t\t\toffsets[mac] = GenerateRestaggerOffset(i, numTX, rateHz)\n434\t\t}\n435\t\n436\t\treturn offsets\n437\t}\n438\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"55bd5d55-a67a-484a-8eda-6703828a5ec3","uuid":"7f6baa86-8fbb-484b-a139-bf7198586400","timestamp":"2026-05-06T12:20:18.866Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/spaxel/mothership/internal/fleet/collision.go","content":"// Package fleet implements TX slot collision detection and adaptive re-stagger\npackage fleet\n\nimport (\n\t\"log\"\n\t\"math/rand\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\t// CollisionWindow is the seconds)\n\tCollisionRateWindow = 60 * time.Second\n\n\t// CollisionRateThreshold is the collision rate that triggers re-stagger (5%)\n\tCollisionRateThreshold = 0.05\n\n\t// MaxCollisionHistory is the maximum number of collision events to keep per link pair\n\tMaxCollisionHistory = 1000\n)\n\n// CollisionEvent represents a detected collision between two TX nodes\ntype CollisionEvent struct {\n\tTimestamp   time.Time\n\tTXMAC1      string\n\tTXMAC2      string\n\tTimeDeltaMs float64\n\tLinkID1     string\n\tLinkID2     string\n}\n\n// CollisionStats tracks collision statistics for a pair triggers re-stagger\ntype CollisionDetector struct {\n\tmu sync.RWMutex\n\n\t// Per-link-pair collision tracking\n\t// Key is \"tx_mac1:tx_mac2\" (sorted lexicographically)\n\tcollisionCount make(map[string]int),\n\t\ttotalFrames:      make(map[string]int),\n\t\tcollisionHistory: make(map[string][]CollisionEvent),\n\t\ttxNodes:          make(map[string]bool),\n\t\tlastArrival:      make(map[string]time.Time),\n\t\trestaggersEnabled: true,\n\t\tframeArrivals:    make(map[string][]time.Time),\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetRestaggerCallback sets the callback function to trigger re-stagger\nfunc
